seoTitle: Northcliffe vs Nowergup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Northcliffe and Nowergup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Northcliffe and Nowergup.
heading: Northcliffe vs Nowergup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Northcliffe, Western Australia and Nowergup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Northcliffe and Nowergup have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Northcliffe or Nowergup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Northcliffe has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Nowergup scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Northcliffe scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Nowergup scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Northcliffe or Nowergup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Northcliffe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
